---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea for StellarForge contracts"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] because [...]

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include specific details about how the feature should work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why are they less preferred?

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
List the specific conditions that must be met for this feature to be considered complete:
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔗 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Priority**: [High/Medium/Low]
- **Complexity**: [Simple/Medium/Complex]
- **Target Contract(s)**: [e.g., forge-vesting, forge-stream, etc.]

## 🤝 Contribution
Are you willing to help implement this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a pull request
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I'd prefer the maintainers to handle it
